Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This is what happened that night...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Using the power of the Great Seal, his own essence became the seal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But when someone's life essence leaves their body, they die...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}To do this intentionally... He must have already found his answer to life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't think he has any regrets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}He even managed to keep his promise to you all before his consciousness finished fading away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}"His promise"? You mean to meet up on graduation day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Wait... How do you know about all that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm probably like Nyx, or this person who became the seal... I think I belong on this side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hm... Nyx is able to bring death to all things, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}If she's that powerful... then what was stopping her before he became the seal?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Then what about before humanity existed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'm not sure why this occurred to me, but I don't think Nyx is malicious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Normally, a seal shouldn't be necessary.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}What!? Are you saying he did this for nothing!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}No, I think what he was actually trying to do—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
